holdings.infoBox: EFA is an equity ETF with a total of 711 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.34%, HSBC Holdings at 1.46%, Roche Holding AG at 1.32%, Novartis AG at 1.27%, and AstraZeneca at 1.23%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI EAFE ETF (EFA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE index, a market-cap-weighted index of developed-market securities based in Europe, Australia and the Far East EFA was launched on Aug 14, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
